title: Greedy Algorithms and Exchange Arguments · Invariant Lens: Exchange Proof
summary: Allocate rooms, bandwidth, and deadlines under competing local choices. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 exchange proof increment in a greedy-design decision and proof notebook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Transform an optimal solution to include the greedy choice without worsening it.
Distinguish optimal substructure from the stronger greedy-choice property.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
